chapters.title: Protein Structure Levels
chapters.transcript: Primary, secondary, tertiary, quaternary. Alpha helices, beta sheets. Domains and motifs.

chapters.title: Experimental Methods
chapters.transcript: X-ray crystallography, NMR, cryo-EM. Resolution and PDB format.

chapters.title: Protein Folding Problem
chapters.transcript: Levinthal's paradox, energy landscapes. Chaperones. Misfolding diseases (Alzheimer's, Parkinson's).

chapters.title: Computational Prediction
chapters.transcript: Homology modeling, threading, ab initio. CASP competition. AlphaFold and RoseTTAFold.

chapters.title: Molecular Docking
chapters.transcript: Ligand-receptor docking. Scoring functions. Drug discovery applications.
